use_cases: Copy npm, pnpm, or bun install commands with one click for quick package setup
Display installation instructions in documentation or landing pages
Support dark mode in developer-focused dashboards and package pages
Provide tabbed interface for switching between package managers
ai_summary: A glassmorphism-styled install snippet component with tabbed interface for npm, pnpm, and bun package managers. Features clipboard copy with fallback support, dark/light mode styling, and visual feedback on copy action. Designed for dev-tools documentation, package landing pages, and SaaS product pages requiring installation instructions.
